title: Craftemon [Cobblemon]
description: A cobblemon addon that adds some minecraft inspired Pokemon
body:
**MAKE SURE YOU PUT IT IN BOTH YOUR RESOURCE PACKS FOLDER AND WORLD DATAPACK FOLDER**!

As of 1.9, I have stopped making content for Craftemon, but I've opened the floodgates for the community to submit changes and additions to be added to future versions of Craftemon. If this interests you, join my server and submit your changes!

![Pictured: @Cobblemon Craftemon was in a state of disrepair, so I gave it a tiny lift and added some of the unfinished crap I had in there.   This will likely be the last version of Craftemon that I make. However, that doesn't mean i wont update it. Effective immediately, a tag called "submissions" will be added to the ⁠customized-datapacks threads channel allowing you to submit rebalances, remodels, extra mons, etc. I thought it right since I'm not focusing on it anymore that the people who love the addon can continue it.   Any submissions added to the addon will be credited on both the modrinth page and in the pokedex of the mon, if the change made has anything to do with said mon. If your change gets overwritten later down the line, your name will not be removed.  Do not give verbal submissions. If your submission doesnt involve the alteration or addition of any assets, then its not allowed. I know that sounds harsh, but in the chance that this catches on, i dont want a bunch of posts that just say "add thing" flooding the channel.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e1ee28de2aa959fdba6e2ec366cbbd902b42cc0.png)


A Cobblemon addon that adds minecraft inspired Pokemon.

Implimented:

--REGULARS--  

- Creeplett - a Grass/Electric type commonly found in forests at night.
- Creeperator - a Grass/Electric type found rarely in forests at night or evolved from Creeplett
- Endisite - a Psychic/Bug type found anywhere in the end. 
- Enderran - a Psychic/Steel type found in the overworld, end, or evolved from Endisite through trade while holding a shulker shell
- Lizkul - a Rock/Ghost type found near sculk in the deep dark. 
- Lizarrden - a Rock/Ghost type found rarely in Ancient Cities or evolved from Lizkul by using an Echo Shard
- Allayze - a Fire type found commonly near Pillager outposts.
- Vexace - a Fire/Ghost type that evolves from Allayze when you give it a totem of undying or rarely found inside of mansions.
- Fortraze - a Fire type that evolves from Allayze when you give it a Blaze rod or found commonly inside of a nether fortress.
- Hurrilay - a Flying type that evolves from Allayze when you give it a phantom membrane or found rarely near copper blocks.
- Coppler - a Steel/Electric type found uncommonly in Villages.
- Qwilprism - a Water/Rock Qwilfish regional form commonly found around sea temples.
- Elderqwil - a Rock/Poison type scarcely found around sea temples or evolves from Qwilprism if given a Heart of the Sea.
- Shulkle - A Bug/Steel Shuckle regional commonly found near End Cities.
- Phantomare - A Ghost/Flying type commonly found in plains biomes at night.
- Patterler - A Fire/Water type commonly found on lava lake netherrack shores.
- Strideler - A Fire/Water type rarely found in the same areas as Patterler or evolves from Patterler through trade.
- Weeplee - A Ghost/Fire type rarely found near the bones of Soul Sand Valleys.
- Ghaslium - A Ghost/Fire type, evolution of Weeplee using a water stone.
- Petrelly - A Poison type of two forms found commonly in Swamps and Basalt Deltas.

--PARADOX POKEMON--

- Chargin Boom - A Grass/Rock type that can scarcely be found near torch flowers placed underground.
- Iron Helper - A Ghost/Electric type that can scarcely be found next to iron blocks near Pillager Outposts

--LEGENDARIES--

- Ranabyss - A curious and michievious Dark/Water type that can scarcely be found on Lily Pads placed within the Ancient Cities.
- Witherich - An aggressive and intimidating Dark/Ghost type that can scarcely be found on Wither Skulls placed on Soul Sand.
- Enderdrake - A powerful and playful Dragon/Psychic type that can scarcely be found on the Dragon Egg when there is End Rods nearby.
- Retmatism - a strange Electric/Poison type that scarcely shows up when netherite blocks are placed in the plains biome.

--MYTHICALS--



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Skybe - A creative and carefree Grass/Flying type that can scarcely be found on Grass Blocks placed above the clouds. (y:190+)
- Withrose - A cheery and loyal Dark/Grass type that can scarcely be found on Wither Roses placed in the Nether.


</details>
